title: Test Impact Analysis
description: TIA request volume, reduction %, risk level distribution, and coverage breadth trends. All data from tia_events and test_coverage_mappings tables.

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT slug FROM teams ORDER BY name

list.name: project
list.label: Project
list.query: SELECT p.slug FROM projects p JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE '$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team' ORDER BY p.name

panels.title: Total TIA Requests
panels.description: Number of analyse() calls in the selected window

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Avg Reduction %
panels.description: Average estimated CI runtime reduction from TIA selections

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(e.reduction_pct) AS value FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND e.reduction_pct IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Mapped Tests
panels.description: Total distinct tests with @AffectedBy coverage data

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.test_case_id) AS value FROM test_coverage_mappings m JOIN projects p ON p.id = m.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Mapped Classes
panels.description: Total distinct production classes covered by at least one test

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.class_name) AS value FROM test_coverage_mappings m JOIN projects p ON p.id = m.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: % Queries LOW Risk
panels.description: Fraction of TIA queries that returned LOW risk (all changed classes covered)

targets.rawSql: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.risk_level = 'LOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Projects with TIA
panels.description: Projects that have at least one coverage mapping

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.project_id) AS value FROM test_coverage_mappings m

panels.title: Risk Level Distribution
panels.description: Breakdown of TIA query outcomes by risk level in the selected window

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.risk_level AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY e.risk_level

panels.title: Avg Reduction % Over Time
panels.description: Daily average estimated reduction %. Higher = more tests skipped safely.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', e.queried_at) AS time, AVG(e.reduction_pct) AS "Reduction %" FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND e.reduction_pct IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY date_trunc('day', e.queried_at) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Risk Level Events Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of TIA queries by risk level — rising CRITICAL/HIGH means coverage gaps are growing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', e.queried_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.risk_level = 'LOW') AS "LOW", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.risk_level = 'MEDIUM') AS "MEDIUM", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.risk_level = 'HIGH') AS "HIGH", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.risk_level = 'CRITICAL') AS "CRITICAL" FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY date_trunc('day', e.queried_at) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Coverage Breadth Growth
panels.description: Distinct mapped tests and classes per day (from last_seen_at). Growing lines = teams are adding @AffectedBy coverage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.last_seen_at) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT m.test_case_id) AS "Mapped Tests", COUNT(DISTINCT m.class_name) AS "Mapped Classes" FROM test_coverage_mappings m JOIN projects p ON p.id = m.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE m.last_seen_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY date_trunc('day', m.last_seen_at) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Selected vs Total Tests
panels.description: Avg selected tests vs avg total tests per TIA query — shows how much of the suite is being skipped.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(e.selected_tests) AS "Avg Selected", AVG(e.total_tests) AS "Avg Total" FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Coverage Breadth by Project
panels.description: Per-project count of mapped tests, mapped classes, and last coverage update.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.slug AS "Team", p.slug AS "Project", COUNT(DISTINCT m.test_case_id) AS "Mapped Tests", COUNT(DISTINCT m.class_name) AS "Mapped Classes", MAX(m.last_seen_at) AS "Last Seen" FROM test_coverage_mappings m JOIN projects p ON p.id = m.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id GROUP BY t.slug, p.slug ORDER BY "Mapped Tests" DESC

panels.title: Recent TIA Events
panels.description: Every analyse() call — queried_at, project, changed classes, selected/total tests, reduction %, risk level, branch.

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.queried_at AS "Time", t.slug AS "Team", p.slug AS "Project", e.changed_classes AS "Changed Classes", e.selected_tests AS "Selected", e.total_tests AS "Total", e.reduction_pct AS "Reduction %", e.risk_level AS "Risk", COALESCE(e.branch, '') AS "Branch", e.triggered_by AS "Triggered By" FROM tia_events e JOIN projects p ON p.id = e.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE e.queried_at >= now() - ($days || ' days')::interval AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') ORDER BY e.queried_at DESC LIMIT 200
